Determine tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) for intrusion sets.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data and AI Research Scientist. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the Data and AI Research Scientist? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the Data and AI Research Scientist. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the Data and AI Research Scientist. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the Data and AI Research Scientist. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
